---
title: "Figure 4"
subtitle: "Creating Figure 4: Phylogenetically ordered estimates of species-level responses to forest fragmentation, expressed as predicted log response ratios (lnRR) of abundance in forest fragments relative to continuous forest. "
Author: "Dillan Hoyt"
execute: 
  eval: true
  echo: false
  message: false
editor: visual
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
toc-title: Contents
---
# Build species-level predictions

```{r}

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(ggplot2)
library(posterior)
library(viridis)
library(scales)
library(stringr)
library(brms)
library(rotl)
library(ape)
library(purrr)
library(cowplot)
library(ragg)
library(grid)
library(ggtree)

# Insert model and csv
meta_species_FC <- read.csv("meta_species_FC.csv")
main_model <- readRDS("m_batTraits_species.student_CF.rds")
moddata <- main_model$data


# Build one representative row per species
species_newdata <- meta_species_FC %>%
  mutate(Species_model = as.character(Species_phylo_use)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Species_model)) %>%
  group_by(Species_model) %>%
  summarise(
    n_obs = n(),
    raw_mean_lnRR = mean(lnRR, na.rm = TRUE),
    Averagemass_g_s = first(Averagemass_g_s[!is.na(Averagemass_g_s)]),
    Aspect_ratio_s = first(Aspect_ratio_s[!is.na(Aspect_ratio_s)]),
    Conservation_status = first(Conservation_status[!is.na(Conservation_status)]),
    Habitat_affinity_new = first(Habitat_affinity_new[!is.na(Habitat_affinity_new)]),
    Diet = first(Diet[!is.na(Diet)]),
    Paper_ID = first(as.character(Paper_ID[!is.na(Paper_ID)])),
    se_obs = mean(se_obs, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    Species_model %in% levels(moddata$Species),
    n_obs >= 5
  )

global_se_obs_mean <- mean(meta_species_FC$se_obs, na.rm = TRUE)
species_newdata <- species_newdata %>%
  mutate(se_obs = ifelse(is.na(se_obs), global_se_obs_mean, se_obs))

species_newdata <- species_newdata %>%
  mutate(
    se_obs = ifelse(is.na(se_obs), global_se_obs_mean, se_obs),
    Species = factor(Species_model, levels = levels(moddata$Species)),
    Paper_ID = factor(Paper_ID, levels = levels(moddata$Paper_ID)),
    Conservation_status = factor(Conservation_status, levels = levels(moddata$Conservation_status)),
    Habitat_affinity_new = factor(Habitat_affinity_new, levels = levels(moddata$Habitat_affinity_new)),
    Diet = factor(Diet, levels = levels(moddata$Diet))
  )
```
# Species-only predictions

```{r}

species_newdata_forpred <- species_newdata %>%
  mutate(Paper_ID = NA)

pred_species_only <- fitted(
  main_model,
  newdata = species_newdata_forpred,
  re_formula = ~ (1 | gr(Species, cov = phylo_cor)),
  summary = TRUE,
  probs = c(0.025, 0.975),
  allow_new_levels = TRUE
)

species_preds <- species_newdata_forpred %>%
  mutate(
    Estimate = pred_species_only[, "Estimate"],
    Q2.5 = pred_species_only[, "Q2.5"],
    Q97.5 = pred_species_only[, "Q97.5"]
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(Averagemass_g_s))

# Build phylogeny
clean_species_name <- function(x) {
  y <- as.character(x)
  y <- trimws(y)
  y <- gsub("_ott\\d+$", "", y)
  y <- gsub("_", " ", y)
  y <- iconv(y, from = "", to = "ASCII//TRANSLIT")
  y <- gsub("\\b(sp|spp|cf)\\b\\.?","", y, ignore.case = TRUE)
  y <- gsub("\\(.*?\\)", "", y)
  y <- gsub("[\"'`]", "", y)
  y <- gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9\\s-]", " ", y)
  y <- gsub("\\s+", " ", y)
  tolower(trimws(y))
}

species_for_tree <- unique(as.character(species_preds$Species))
species_for_tree_clean <- unique(vapply(species_for_tree, clean_species_name, character(1)))

tnrs_matches_fig <- tnrs_match_names(species_for_tree_clean)
tnrs_df_fig <- as_tibble(tnrs_matches_fig) %>%
  mutate(
    search_string = as.character(search_string),
    unique_name = as.character(unique_name),
    ott_id = suppressWarnings(as.integer(ott_id))
  )

ott_lookup_fig <- tnrs_df_fig %>%
  filter(!is.na(unique_name), unique_name != "", !is.na(ott_id)) %>%
  mutate(
    Species_phylo = paste0(gsub(" ", "_", unique_name), "_ott", ott_id)
  ) %>%
  select(search_string, Species_phylo, ott_id) %>%
  distinct(search_string, .keep_all = TRUE)

ott_ids_fig <- na.omit(unique(ott_lookup_fig$ott_id))
tree_fig <- tol_induced_subtree(ott_ids = ott_ids_fig)
tree_bl_fig <- ape::compute.brlen(tree_fig, method = "Grafen")
phylo_cor_fig <- ape::vcv.phylo(tree_bl_fig, corr = TRUE)

# Match predicted species to the tree built for this figure
species_preds <- species_preds %>%
  mutate(Species = as.character(Species))

tips_to_keep <- intersect(tree_bl_fig$tip.label, species_preds$Species)
tree_pruned <- ape::keep.tip(tree_bl_fig, tips_to_keep)

spec_dat <- species_preds %>%
  filter(Species %in% tips_to_keep) %>%
  distinct(Species, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    Species_clean = gsub("_ott[0-9]+", "", Species),
    Species_clean = gsub("_", " ", Species_clean)
  ) %>%
  mutate(Species_clean = case_when(
    Species == "Pteronotus_parnellii_mesoamericanus_ott6146437" ~ "Pteronotus mesoamericanus",
    Species == "Artibeus_glaucus_watsoni_ott805986" ~ "Dermanura watsoni",
    Species == "Artibeus_phaeotis_ott513447" ~ "Dermanura phaotis",
    Species == "Platyrrhinus_helleri_incarum_ott873032" ~ "Platyrrhinus incarum",
    Species == "Artibeus_glaucus_gnomus_ott513423" ~ "Dermanura gnoma",
    Species == "Micronycteris_nicefori_ott218136" ~ "Trinycteris nicefori",
    Species == "Artibeus_aztecus_ott1039987" ~ "Dermanura azteca",
    Species == "Artibeus_cinereus_ott513419" ~ "Dermanura cinereus",
    TRUE ~ Species_clean
  ))
```
### Creating plot: 

```{r}
#matching species to clades 
p_tree_base <- ggtree(tree_pruned)
tip_order_df <- p_tree_base$data %>%
  filter(isTip) %>%
  arrange(y) %>%
  transmute(Species = label)

tip_order_clean <- tip_order_df %>%
  left_join(spec_dat %>% select(Species, Species_clean), by = "Species") %>%
  mutate(Species_clean = make.unique(Species_clean)) %>%
  pull(Species_clean)

spec_dat <- spec_dat %>%
  mutate(Species_clean = factor(Species_clean, levels = tip_order_clean))

spec_dat <- spec_dat %>%
  mutate(Species_label = paste0(Species_clean, " (", n_obs, ")"))

tip_order_label <- tip_order_df %>%
  left_join(spec_dat %>% select(Species, Species_label), by = "Species") %>%
  mutate(
    Species_label = ifelse(
      is.na(Species_label),
      paste0(gsub("_ott[0-9]+", "", Species) %>% gsub("_", " ", .), " (0)"),
      Species_label
    )
  ) %>%
  pull(Species_label)

spec_dat <- spec_dat %>%
  mutate(Species_label = factor(Species_label, levels = tip_order_label))

n_species_plot <- nrow(spec_dat)
n_effects_plot <- sum(spec_dat$n_obs)
subtitle_txt <- paste0(
  "Predicted species lnRR — ",
  n_species_plot, " species, ",
  n_effects_plot, " observations, 17 studies"
)
```
# Adjusting clade labels: 
```{r}
clade_members_explicit <- list(
  Stenodermatinae = c(
    "Artibeus_jamaicensis_ott289157",
    "Artibeus_lituratus_ott857633",
    "Artibeus_cinereus_ott513419",
    "Artibeus_concolor_ott513416",
    "Artibeus_obscurus_ott513451",
    "Artibeus_phaeotis_ott513447",
    "Artibeus_glaucus_watsoni_ott805986",
    "Artibeus_glaucus_gnomus_ott513423",
    "Artibeus_toltecus_ott362821",
    "Artibeus_anderseni_ott805983",
    "Artibeus_aztecus_ott1039987",
    "Artibeus_hartii_ott927292",
    "Ametrida_centurio_ott895014",
    "Centurio_senex_ott351782",
    "Dermanura_phaeotis_ott513447",
    "Dermanura_watsoni_ott805986",
    "Dermanura_tolteca_ott362821",
    "Platyrrhinus_dorsalis_ott981722",
    "Platyrrhinus_brachycephalus_ott295643",
    "Platyrrhinus_helleri_incarum_ott873032",
    "Platyrrhinus_lineatus_ott780066",
    "Platyrrhinus_recifinus_ott348438",
    "Uroderma_bilobatum_ott401290",
    "Uroderma_magnirostrum_ott605658",
    "Vampyressa_pusilla_ott269233",
    "Vampyressa_nymphaea_ott981726",
    "Vampyressa_bidens_ott842098",
    "Vampyressa_brocki_ott655347",
    "Vampyrodes_caraccioli_ott269230",
    "Vampyrodes_major_ott569768",
    "Mesophylla_macconnelli_ott534178",
    "Sturnira_lilium_ott401293",
    "Sturnira_tildae_ott401295",
    "Sturnira_ludovici_ott136687",
    "Chiroderma_villosum_ott565586",
    "Chiroderma_trinitatum_ott351787",
    "Chiroderma_salvini_ott351785",
    "Pygoderma_bilabiatum_ott894971",
    "Plathyrrhinus_recifinus_ott348438",
    "Vampyressa_thyone_ott393959"
  ),
  Natalidae = c("Natalus_stramineus_ott579474"),
  Carolliinae_Rhinophyllinae = c(
    "Carollia_brevicauda_ott758569",
    "Carollia_perspicillata_ott1039980",
    "Carollia_castanea_ott941606",
    "Carollia_sowelli_ott958288",
    "Carollia_subrufa_ott587100",
    "Rhinophylla_pumilio_ott546394",
    "Rhinophylla_fischerae_ott546395"
  ),
  Glossophaginae_Lonchophyllinae = c(
    "Glossophaga_soricina_ott876514",
    "Glossophaga_commissarisi_ott801225",
    "Glossophaga_leachii_ott227303",
    "Glossophaga_morenoi_ott227308",
    "Choeroniscus_minor_ott596426",
    "Choeroniscus_godmani_ott503371",
    "Anoura_geoffroyi_ott688667",
    "Anoura_caudifer_ott351792",
    "Leptonycteris_nivalis_ott493740",
    "Hylonycteris_underwoodi_ott658357",
    "Hsunycteris_thomasi_ott546392",
    "Lonchophylla_robusta_ott248894",
    "Lonchophylla_mordax_ott248895",
    "Lonchophylla_thomasi_ott546392",
    "Lichonycteris_obscura_ott633519"
  ),
  Glyphonycterinae = c(
    "Glyphonycteris_daviesi_ott201779",
    "Glyphonycteris_sylvestris_ott599548",
    "Micronycteris_nicefori_ott218136"
  ),
  Micronycterinae = c(
    "Micronycteris_megalotis_ott218140",
    "Micronycteris_brachyotis_ott201782",
    "Micronycteris_microtis_ott596443",
    "Micronycteris_hirsuta_ott218141",
    "Micronycteris_schmidtorum_ott218135",
    "Micronycteris_minuta_ott218139"
  ),
  Phyllostominae = c(
    "Chrotopterus_auritus_ott1060474",
    "Gardnerycteris_crenulatum_ott792611",
    "Lophostoma_evotis_ott375137",
    "Lophostoma_silvicolum_ott951266",
    "Lophostoma_brasiliense_ott78017",
    "Lophostoma_carrikeri_ott856239",
    "Lophostoma_schulzi_ott78020",
    "Phylloderma_stenops_ott792612",
    "Phyllostomus_discolor_ott459982",
    "Phyllostomus_hastatus_ott761775",
    "Phyllostomus_elongatus_ott1011474",
    "Tonatia_bidens_ott761780",
    "Tonatia_saurophila_ott1074690",
    "Trachops_cirrhosus_ott792613",
    "Vampyrum_spectrum_ott353066",
    "Mimon_cozumelae_ott860220",
    "Chiroderma_doriae_ott565588",
    "Lonchorhina_aurita_ott218142"
  ),
  Desmodontinae = c(
    "Desmodus_rotundus_ott238431",
    "Diaemus_youngi_ott1060472",
    "Diphylla_ecaudata_ott1060475"
  ),
  Mormoopidae = c(
    "Mormoops_megalophylla_ott342713",
    "Pteronotus_parnellii_ott867405",
    "Pteronotus_davyi_ott759858",
    "Pteronotus_gymnonotus_ott554240",
    "Pteronotus_personatus_ott554238",
    "Pteronotus_alitonus_ott7067797",
    "Pteronotus_rubiginosus_ott994100"
  ),
  Emballonuridae = c(
    "Rhynchonycteris_naso_ott75166",
    "Saccopteryx_bilineata_ott190912",
    "Saccopteryx_leptura_ott75192",
    "Saccopteryx_canescens_ott232381",
    "Peropteryx_macrotis_ott75163",
    "Peropteryx_kappleri_ott75160",
    "Peropteryx_leucoptera_ott755426",
    "Emballonura_atrata_ott156176",
    "Diclidurus_albus_ott1060477",
    "Centronycteris_maximiliani_ott846879",
    "Centronycteris_centralis_ott432531",
    "Cormura_brevirostris_ott75171",
    "Cyttarops_alecto_ott599540"
  ),
  Noctilionidae = c(
    "Noctilio_leporinus_ott604404",
    "Noctilio_albiventris_ott604407"
  ),
  Vespertilionidae = c(
    "Myotis_riparius_ott267991",
    "Myotis_nigricans_ott307133",
    "Myotis_albescens_ott353889",
    "Myotis_brandtii_ott353460",
    "Myotis_daubentonii_ott407052",
    "Myotis_mystacinus_ott353458",
    "Myotis_simus_ott1066079",
    "Myotis_oxyotus_ott878679",
    "Myotis_ruber_ott878678",
    "Eptesicus_brasiliensis_ott176332",
    "Eptesicus_furinalis_ott842474",
    "Eptesicus_serotinus_ott15443",
    "Lasionycteris_noctivagans_ott401283",
    "Lasiurus_blossevillii_ott362948",
    "Lasiurus_borealis_ott61860",
    "Pipistrellus_nathusii_ott867399",
    "Pipistrellus_ceylonicus_ott743848",
    "Perimyotis_subflavus_ott977400",
    "Eptesicus_fuscus_ott10737",
    "Scotophilus_dinganii_ott759739",
    "Scotophilus_nux_ott759736",
    "Nyctalus_leisleri_ott342721",
    "Nyctalus_noctula_ott261435",
    "Plecotus_auritus_ott350140",
    "Cynomops_abrasus_ott1014495",
    "Cynomops_planirostris_ott130215",
    "Dasypterus_ega_ott635119",
    "Rhogeessa_tumida_ott76917"
  ),
  Molossidae = c(
    "Molossus_molossus_ott301603",
    "Molossus_rufus_ott267993",
    "Molossops_temminckii_ott633522",
    "Molossus_currentium_ott3614007"
  )
)

spec_dat$clade_group <- NA_character_
for (clade in names(clade_members_explicit)) {
  members <- clade_members_explicit[[clade]]
  spec_dat$clade_group[spec_dat$Species %in% members] <- clade
}
spec_dat$clade_group <- factor(spec_dat$clade_group, levels = names(clade_members_explicit))
```
# Adjusting colours
```{r}
clade_palette <- c(
  Vespertilionidae = "#4477AA",
  Stenodermatinae = "#228833",
  Carolliinae_Rhinophyllinae = "#CCBB44",
  Glyphonycterinae = "#66CCEE",
  Micronycterinae = "#AA3377",
  Phyllostominae = "#AA4499",
  Glossophaginae_Lonchophyllinae = "#EE7733",
  Natalidae = "#BB5566",
  Desmodontinae = "#009988",
  Emballonuridae = "#888888",
  Noctilionidae = "#E69F00",
  Mormoopidae = "#332288"
)

species_to_clade <- imap(clade_members_explicit, ~ setNames(rep(.y, length(.x)), .x)) %>%
  flatten_chr()

spec_dat <- spec_dat %>%
  mutate(
    Species = as.character(Species),
    Species = stringr::str_squish(Species),
    clade_group = species_to_clade[Species],
    clade_group = ifelse(is.na(clade_group), "unknown", clade_group)
  )

clade_palette <- c(clade_palette, unknown = "#CFCFCF")
spec_dat$FORCED_colour <- clade_palette[as.character(spec_dat$clade_group)]
```
#Plotting: 

```{r}

p_tree <- ggtree(tree_pruned) %<+% spec_dat +
  geom_tippoint(aes(color = Estimate), size = 2) +
  geom_tiplab(
    aes(label = as.character(Species_label)),
    align = TRUE, linetype = 0,
    hjust = 0.05, offset = 0.035,
    size = 2.6
  ) +
  xlim_tree(1) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  scale_color_gradient2(
    low = "red",
    mid = "grey80",
    high = "lightblue",
    midpoint = 0,
    name = "Predicted lnRR",
    guide = guide_colourbar(
      barheight = unit(50, "mm"),
      barwidth = unit(8, "mm")
    )
  ) +
  theme_tree2() +
  theme(
    legend.position = c(0.15, 0.86),
    plot.margin = margin(5, 80, 5, 5)
  )

# ---------------------------
# 7) Forest plot
# ---------------------------
p_forest <- ggplot(spec_dat, aes(x = Estimate, y = Species_label)) +
  geom_errorbarh(
    aes(xmin = Q2.5, xmax = Q97.5, colour = FORCED_colour),
    height = 0.2, alpha = 0.85, linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  geom_point(aes(colour = FORCED_colour), size = 2.6) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey50", linewidth = 0.4) +
  scale_colour_identity() +
  labs(
    title = "Species-specific predicted lnRR (Fragment vs Continuous Forest)",
    subtitle = subtitle_txt,
    x = "Predicted lnRR (log response ratio of abundance)",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey93"),
    plot.margin = margin(20, 10, 5, 40)
  )

# ---------------------------
# 8) Clade legend
# ---------------------------
clade_order_forced <- c(
  "Stenodermatinae",
  "Carolliinae_Rhinophyllinae",
  "Glyphonycterinae",
  "Phyllostominae",
  "Glossophaginae_Lonchophyllinae",
  "Micronycterinae",
  "Mormoopidae",
  "Desmodontinae",
  "Noctilionidae",
  "Emballonuridae",
  "Vespertilionidae",
  "Natalidae"
)

available_clades <- intersect(clade_order_forced, names(clade_palette))
clade_palette <- clade_palette[available_clades]

clade_labels <- c(
  Vespertilionidae = "Vespertilionidae",
  Stenodermatinae = "Stenodermatinae",
  Carolliinae_Rhinophyllinae = "Carolliinae & Rhinophyllinae",
  Glyphonycterinae = "Glyphonycterinae",
  Micronycterinae = "Micronycterinae",
  Phyllostominae = "Phyllostominae",
  Glossophaginae_Lonchophyllinae = "Glossophaginae & Lonchophyllinae",
  Desmodontinae = "Desmodontinae",
  Noctilionidae = "Noctilionidae",
  Emballonuridae = "Emballonuridae",
  Mormoopidae = "Mormoopidae",
  Natalidae = "Natalidae"
)

legend_df <- tibble(
  clade = names(clade_palette),
  label = unname(clade_labels[names(clade_palette)]),
  y = seq_along(clade_palette),
  hex = unname(clade_palette)
)

legend_plot <- ggplot(legend_df, aes(y = y)) +
  geom_rect(
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    xmin = 0, xmax = 1.25,
    ymin = 0.15, ymax = nrow(legend_df) + 0.5,
    fill = "white", colour = "grey80", linewidth = 0.25
  ) +
  geom_tile(
    aes(x = 0.15, fill = clade),
    width = 0.15,
    height = 0.55,
    colour = NA
  ) +
  geom_text(aes(x = 0.38, label = label), hjust = 0, size = 8, family = "sans") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = clade_palette, guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1.25), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_reverse(limits = c(nrow(legend_df) + 0.85, 0.15), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA)
  )

ggsave(
  filename = "legend_plot_phyloFig.tiff",
  plot = legend_plot,
  device = ragg::agg_tiff,
  width = 7,
  height = 5,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 600,
  limitsize = FALSE
)

# ---------------------------
# 9) Combine and save
# ---------------------------
p_combined <- plot_grid(
  p_tree,
  p_forest,
  ncol = 2,
  rel_widths = c(0.35, 0.65),
  align = "h"
)

p_final <- p_combined +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.margin = margin(t = 30, r = 30, b = 30, l = 30),
    strip.placement = "outside",
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

print(p_final)

ggsave(
  filename = "Fig_4_phylogeny.tiff",
  plot = p_final,
  device = ragg::agg_tiff,
  width = 16,
  height = 10,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 600,
  limitsize = FALSE
)
```
